title: westringia brevifolia var. raleighii
intro: Westringia brevifolia var. raleighii, also known as the small leafed westringia, is a shrub native to Australia, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Westringia brevifolia var. raleighii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, Westringia brevifolia var. raleighii is used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
